reference: Hi Doctor, I am an eighteen-year-old girl. It has been quite noticeable for some time that I have had excessive hair loss, especially in my hairline. I am a ballet dancer and have been putting my hair in buns ever since I was little. Two years ago, I started training in a full-time course which meant I needed to put my hair in a bun every day with hairspray, and many times I got home too late to wash it out. Now I am taking more caution, but I have lost a lot of hair and my hairline has receded significantly. Is there anything I can do to reverse or help it?
text: Hi, doctor. I am an 18-year-old girl. It has been quite noticeable for some time that I have had excessive hair loss, especially in my hairline. I am a ballet dancer and have been putting my hair in buns ever since I was little. Two years ago, I started training in a full-time course, which meant I needed to put my in a bun every day with hairspray. Many times, I got home too late to wash it out. Now I am taking more caution, but I have lost a lot of hair and my hairline has receded significantly. Is there anything I can do to reverse or help it?
